name: Chocolate-Covered Peanut Patties (Mazapan)
recipeInstructions:
1. Grind the peanuts fine in a food processor.
2. Add sugar and process until a compact paste forms.
3. Divide the paste into 12 equal portions.
4. Mold each portion into thick disks in a 2½-inch diameter ramekin.
5. Remove the disks carefully from the mold.
6. Melt the chocolate in a double boiler, keeping it warm.
7. Spoon about one generous tablespoon of melted chocolate onto wax paper.
8. Carefully place one peanut disk on top and spread around to cover the entire bottom.
9. Enrobe the top and sides with more melted chocolate.
10. Repeat for the remaining disks.
11. Place candies still on wax paper in the refrigerator until ready to serve.
Each serving contains about: 424 calories; 3 mg sodium; trace cholesterol; 28 grams fat; 36 grams carbohydrates; 13 grams protein; 2.48 grams fiber.
